prestazioni: VK45DE (4.5L V8) engine: Full forged internals by JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression, 95mm bore) with Manley H-beam connecting rods and ACL Race Series bearings, paired with a custom Tomei 272° camshaft grind for high-RPM power (8,500 RPM redline).

Forced induction: Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (core dimensions: 24x6x3.5 inches) and a Tomei M82 blow-off valve.

Fuel and ignition: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, AEM 320LPH external pump, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom wiring harness by Painless Performance. Ignition system upgraded to Splitfire coil packs and NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (heat range 8).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Q45-specific, not G35/G37) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (2-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear) and a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the hood and roof.

OEM+ aggressive stance: Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x10 +20 front, 19x11 +30 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear), paired with BC Racing BR coilovers (custom valving for Q45 chassis) and Cusco front/rear strut bars.

Aerodynamics: Veilside Fortune 3-style front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter (custom-made for Q45), custom 3D-printed rear diffuser by Maxton Design, and a Seibon carbon fiber trunk with integrated ducktail spoiler (functional, 15% downforce increase at 100 mph).
